reviews.review_description: Mind blowing experience and good graphics for this price..

developer_response.body: Hello!! Thank you very much for the review and I'm glad you liked it. It is my first game in VR, there are many things that could have been improved but I have given it the best of my intentions, greetings.

reviews.review_title: Game seems like it will be really cool
reviews.review_description: I really have enjoyed the game so far. Super cool concept. Only issue is I haven’t really been able to play the game yet because I can’t get past the training. Most of the training exercises seem impossible to pass and it gets frustrating because I just want to get to the actual game. Otherwise, the game itself looks really cool. I can’t wait to pass the training exercises and see more!

developer_response.body:
Hello thank you very much for your score, please support mail is support@chesco.red if you have trouble getting through.

It is not a very long game, it requires a little patience, but if you see complicated these screens do not hesitate to write, greetings.
